rules.description: Force push to main/master is unconditionally forbidden
rules.message: Force pushing to main/master is forbidden. Use a PR and merge strategy instead.

rules.description: Hard reset on main/master destroys history and is forbidden
rules.message: Hard reset on main/master is forbidden. Revert commits instead.

rules.description: git filter-branch on shared refs rewrites published history
rules.message: Rewriting history on shared/protected branches is forbidden.

rules.description: Force push to any branch requires human approval
rules.message: Force push rewrites remote history — requires explicit approval and team coordination.

rules.description: Rebasing on protected branches requires approval
rules.message: Rebasing onto a protected branch requires approval — this rewrites shared history.
Rebase rewrites commit history — requires approval.

rules.description: Force branch deletion (-D) skips the merge check
rules.message: Force branch deletion bypasses the unmerged-commits check — requires approval.
Tag deletion requires approval — tags may mark releases.

rules.description: git clean removes untracked files — requires approval
rules.message: git clean permanently removes untracked files — requires approval.

rules.description: Expiring reflog removes the safety net for recovery
rules.message: Expiring reflog entries makes past states unrecoverable — requires approval.
git gc --prune permanently deletes unreachable git objects — requires approval.

rules.description: Amending pushed commits rewrites published history
rules.message: Amending a commit that may have been pushed will cause history divergence.
Commit amend requires dry-run — verify the amendment will not rewrite pushed commits.

rules.description: Reset requires dry-run to preview impact
rules.message: Reset requires dry-run — verify target ref and scope of change.

rules.description: Stash drop permanently removes stash entries
rules.message: Stash drop is irreversible — review stash contents before dropping.

rules.description: Read-only operations (status, log, diff, show) are always safe

rules.message: git fetch only updates remote-tracking refs — auto-approved.

rules.description: Pushing to protected branches requires dry-run
rules.message: Pushing to a protected branch requires dry-run preview.
